Utilizing data from the Panel Study of Income Dynamics (PSID), we find that race and parental education interact with parental income in children’s economic prospects in ways that can create bottlenecks in mobility.
33349.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一个完全非参数模型来研究离散结果下代际收入流动性的动态。在我们的模型中，个体的收入阶层概率取决于父母的收入，其方式能够容纳各种个体和父母特征（包括种族、教育和父母生育年龄）之间的非线性和交互作用。因此，我们提供了马尔可夫链流动性模型的推广。我们采用机器学习中的核技术，并进一步进行正则化来估计这个高度灵活的模型。利用收入动态面板研究（PSID）的数据，我们发现，种族和父母教育会与父母收入相互作用，影响子女的经济前景，这种方式可能会在流动性中造成瓶颈。
33349.meta: Programs：ED, EFG, LS, PE；JEL：C10, C50, D30, I24

33348.title: The Effects of Digital Surveillance and Managerial Clarity on Performance
33348.zh_title: 数字监控与管理清晰度对绩效的影响
33348.abstract: How managers frame the adoption of organizational practices may impact the returns to such practices, but managerial justification is often correlated with the use of particular practices or other dimensions of managerial quality. Using a randomized control trial, we study how the causal impacts of a frequently used monitoring management practice for remote work employers–digital worker surveillance–varies by randomly allocated justification for its use. In an online labor market, we divide workers into low and high-productivity performers, and randomize both whether surveillance is used and whether its use is justified based on the workers’ baseline productivity. We find that digital surveillance does not have significant effects on worker performance on average, but that not explaining the presence or elimination of digital surveillance based on worker performance significantly reduces worker output. Our results demonstrate a nuanced relationship between monitoring and worker performance that depends on how monitoring is rationalized to workers.
33348.zh_abstract: 管理者如何阐述组织实践的采纳方式可能会影响此类实践的回报，但管理层的理由往往与特定实践的使用或管理质量的其他维度相关。通过一项随机对照试验，我们研究了一种远程工作雇主常用的监控管理实践——数字员工监控——的因果影响如何因随机分配的监控使用理由而变化。在一个在线劳动力市场中，我们将工人分为低生产率和高生产率表现者，并随机分配是否使用监控，以及是否根据工人的基线生产率来证明监控使用的合理性。我们发现，数字监控平均而言对工人绩效没有显著影响，但不根据工人绩效来解释监控的存在或取消会显著降低工人的产出。我们的结果展示了监控与工人绩效之间一种微妙的、取决于如何向工人合理化监控的关系。

33347.title: Entrepreneurship and the Gig Economy: Evidence from U.S. Tax Returns
33347.zh_title: 创业与零工经济：来自美国纳税申报表的证据
33347.authors: Matthew R. Denes, Spyridon Lagaras, Margarita Tsoutsoura
33347.abstract: Platform intermediation of goods and services has considerably transformed the U.S. economy. We use administrative data on U.S. tax returns to study the role of the gig economy on entrepreneurship. We find that gig workers are more likely to become entrepreneurs, particularly those who are lower income, younger, and benefit from flexibility. We track all newly created firms and show that gig workers start firms in similar industries as their gig experience, which are less likely to survive and demonstrate higher performance. Overall, our findings suggest on-the-job learning promotes entrepreneurial entry and shifts the types of firms started by entrepreneurs.
33347.zh_abstract: 商品和服务的平台中介已显著改变了美国经济。我们利用美国纳税申报表的行政数据来研究零工经济对创业的作用。我们发现，零工工人更有可能成为企业家，尤其是那些收入较低、较年轻且受益于灵活性的群体。我们追踪所有新成立的企业，并显示零工工人创办的企业与其零工经历所在的行业相似，这些企业存活率较低但表现出更高的绩效。总体而言，我们的研究结果表明，在职学习促进了创业进入，并改变了企业家创办企业的类型。
33347.meta: Programs：CF, PR；JEL：G30, J21, J22, J24, L26

33346.title: Daughters as Safety Net? Family Responses to Parental Employment Shocks: Evidence from Alcohol Prohibition
33346.zh_title: 女儿作为安全网？家庭对父母就业冲击的反应：来自禁酒令的证据
33346.authors: Anna Aizer, Gabrielle Grafton, Santiago Pérez
33346.abstract: We study the impact of Federal alcohol Prohibition in 1919 on workers in the alcohol industry and their families using newly linked census records that allow us to follow spouses, sons and daughters. Immediately after Prohibition, men previously working in alcohol-related industries were less likely to be in the labor force, and when working, employed in lower skilled occupations. By 1940, 21 years after Prohibition, workers were still more likely to be in unskilled occupations, but they were more likely to be employed, consistent with delayed retirement. In the short run, sons are largely unaffected but in the long run, they complete slightly more schooling and earn more. Interestingly, daughters were more likely to remain at home, delay marriage and be employed, even 20 years later. These effects are driven by daughters living at home in 1920. Daughters, not sons, appear to have acted as the family's safety net in this period before public provision of relief.
33346.zh_abstract: 我们利用新关联的人口普查记录，追踪配偶、儿子和女儿，研究了1919年联邦禁酒令对酒精行业工人及其家庭的影响。禁酒令实施后，先前在酒精相关行业工作的男性立即更可能退出劳动力市场，即使在工作时，也从事技能要求较低的职业。到禁酒令实施21年后的1940年，这些工人仍更可能从事非技能职业，但他们更可能被雇佣，这与延迟退休一致。短期内，儿子基本不受影响，但长期来看，他们完成了略多的教育并赚取了更多收入。有趣的是，女儿更可能留在家中、推迟结婚并就业，这种影响甚至在20年后依然存在。这些效应是由1920年居住在家中的女儿驱动的。在这个公共救济尚未提供的时期，女儿而非儿子，似乎充当了家庭的安全网。
33346.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, LS, PE；JEL：J13, J20, J62, N32, N62

33345.title: Externalities and the Taxation of Top Earners
33345.zh_title: 外部性与高收入者的税收
33345.abstract: This paper characterizes the optimal taxation of top earners in a world with externalities. It takes a reduced-form approach that spans a broad class of models where top earners create externalities on the economy. The model allows for a flexible relationship between top earnings and the distribution of earnings capacities in the population, including positive externalities (such as innovation) and negative externalities (such as rent-extraction). The model allows for simple optimal tax formulas that clarify the role of different externality patterns. In general, externalities that run from top earners to bottom earners have much stronger tax implications than externalities within the top group. The results are expressed in terms of estimable sufficient statistics and linked to recent evidence on the externalities of top entrepreneurs. A calibration to the US economy suggests that the optimal top tax rate, while lower than the Mirrleesian optimum, remains higher than the current top tax rate.
33345.zh_abstract: 本文描述了存在外部性的世界中高收入者的最优税收特征。它采用了一种简约形式的方法，涵盖了高收入者对经济产生外部性的广泛模型类别。该模型允许高收入与人口中收入能力分布之间存在灵活的关系，包括正外部性（如创新）和负外部性（如寻租）。该模型得出了简单的最优税收公式，阐明了不同外部性模式的作用。一般而言，从高收入者流向低收入者的外部性比高收入群体内部的外部性具有更强的税收含义。结果以可估计的充分统计量表示，并与近期关于顶级企业家外部性的证据相关联。对美国经济的校准表明，最优最高税率虽然低于米尔利斯最优水平，但仍高于当前的最高税率。
33345.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PE, POL；JEL：H21, H23, H24, H31

33344.title: Large Language Models: An Applied Econometric Framework
33344.zh_title: 大型语言模型：一个应用计量经济学框架
33344.authors: Jens Ludwig, Sendhil Mullainathan, Ashesh Rambachan
33344.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) enable researchers to analyze text at unprecedented scale and minimal cost. Researchers can now revisit old questions and tackle novel ones with rich data. We provide an econometric framework for realizing this potential in two empirical uses. For prediction problems – forecasting outcomes from text – valid conclusions require “no training leakage” between the LLM’s training data and the researcher’s sample, which can be enforced through careful model choice and research design. For estimation problems – automating the measurement of economic concepts for downstream analysis – valid downstream inference requires combining LLM outputs with a small validation sample to deliver consistent and precise estimates. Absent a validation sample, researchers cannot assess possible errors in LLM outputs, and consequently seemingly innocuous choices (which model, which prompt) can produce dramatically different parameter estimates. When used appropriately, LLMs are powerful tools that can expand the frontier of empirical economics.
33344.zh_abstract: 大型语言模型使研究人员能够以前所未有的规模和最低的成本分析文本。研究人员现在可以重新审视旧问题，并利用丰富的数据处理新问题。我们提供了一个计量经济学框架，以在两种实证应用中实现这一潜力。对于预测问题——从文本预测结果——有效的结论要求LLM的训练数据与研究人员的样本之间“无训练泄漏”，这可以通过谨慎的模型选择和研究设计来强制执行。对于估计问题——自动化测量经济概念以供下游分析——有效的下游推断需要将LLM输出与一个小型验证样本相结合，以提供一致且精确的估计。如果没有验证样本，研究人员无法评估LLM输出中可能的错误，因此看似无害的选择（哪个模型、哪个提示）可能会产生截然不同的参数估计。当使用得当时，LLM是能够扩展实证经济学前沿的强大工具。
33344.meta: Programs：AP, CF, CH, DAE, DEV, ED, EEE, EFG, EH, LE, LS, PE, POL, PR, TWP；JEL：C01, C45

33343.title: The Economy, the Ghost in Your Gene, and the Escape from Premature Mortality
33343.zh_title: 经济、基因中的幽灵与逃离过早死亡
33343.authors: Dora Costa, Lars Olov Bygren, Benedikt Graf, Martin Karlsson, Joseph Price
33343.abstract: Explanations for the West's escape from premature mortality have focused on chronic malnutrition or income and on public health or state capacity. We argue that by ignoring the multigenerational effects of variance in ancestors' harvests, we are underestimating the contribution of modern economic growth to the escape from early death at older ages. Using a newly constructed multigenerational dataset for Sweden, we show that grandsons' longevity was strongly linked to spatial shocks in paternal grandfathers' yearly harvest variability when agricultural productivity was low and market integration was limited. We reason that an epigenetic mechanism is the most plausible explanation for our findings. We posit that the removal of trade barriers, improvements in transportation, and agricultural innovation reduced harvest variability. We contend that for older Swedish men (but not women) born 1830-1909 this reduction was as important as decreasing contemporaneous infectious disease rates and more important than eliminating exposure to poor harvests in-utero.
33343.zh_abstract: 关于西方世界逃离过早死亡的解释，一直聚焦于慢性营养不良或收入，以及公共卫生或国家能力。我们认为，由于忽视了祖先收成变异性的多代影响，我们低估了现代经济增长对逃离老年早期死亡的贡献。利用瑞典新构建的多代数据集，我们显示，在农业生产力低下且市场一体化有限的时期，孙辈的寿命与父系祖父年度收成变异性的空间冲击密切相关。我们推断，表观遗传机制是我们发现的最合理解释。我们假设，贸易壁垒的消除、交通的改善和农业创新减少了收成变异性。我们认为，对于1830-1909年出生的瑞典老年男性（而非女性）而言，这种减少与同时期传染病发病率的下降同等重要，并且比消除子宫内不良收成暴露更为重要。
33343.meta: Programs：AG, CH, DAE, DEV；JEL：I15, J11, N33

33342.title: Charging Uncertainty: Real-Time Charging Data and Electric Vehicle Adoption
33342.zh_title: 充电不确定性：实时充电数据与电动汽车普及
33342.authors: Omar Isaac Asensio, Elaine Buckberg, Cassandra Cole, Luke Heeney, Christopher R. Knittel, James H. Stock
33342.abstract: Charging infrastructure is critical to electric vehicle (EV) adoption, but for chargers to be most useful, EV drivers need to know in real time where they are and whether they are working and available. We investigate the availability of real-time data from DC fast chargers on six major US Interstates and model the impacts of expanding access to real-time data to all DC fast chargers near highways. On average, between March and August 2024, 32.9% of DC fast charging stations adjacent to those six Interstates provided their real-time status on PlugShare, a major charge-finding app, with gaps of up to 1,308 miles without real-time data. Further, we survey potential car buyers and EV owners and find low credibility of currently-available real-time data. We incorporate this data into a two-sided model of consumer vehicle choice and charging station build-out adapted from Cole et al. (2023). If universal real-time data is accompanied by improved charger uptime and driver confidence in the accuracy of the real-time data, we predict that the EV share of new vehicle sales would grow by 8.0 percentage points in 2030, expanding the EV fleet by 13.2%, and reducing 2030 carbon emissions by 22.5 mmt, versus baseline projections for 2030.
33342.zh_abstract: 充电基础设施对电动汽车的普及至关重要，但要使充电器发挥最大效用，电动汽车驾驶员需要实时了解充电器的位置、是否工作以及是否可用。我们调查了美国六条主要州际公路上直流快充桩实时数据的可用性，并模拟了将实时数据访问扩展到高速公路附近所有直流快充桩的影响。平均而言，在2024年3月至8月期间，这六条州际公路沿线32.9%的直流快充站通过主要找桩应用PlugShare提供了其实时状态，其间存在长达1308英里的无实时数据空白。此外，我们调查了潜在购车者和电动汽车车主，发现他们对当前可用实时数据的信任度较低。我们将这些数据纳入一个改编自Cole等人（2023）的消费者车辆选择和充电站建设的双边模型中。如果通用实时数据伴随着充电桩运行时间的改善以及驾驶员对实时数据准确性的信心提升，我们预测，与2030年的基线预测相比，到2030年电动汽车在新车销售中的份额将增长8.0个百分点，电动汽车车队规模将扩大13.2%，并减少2250万吨的碳排放。

33376.title: What is the General Welfare? Welfare Economic Perspectives on Prosperity and Equity
33376.zh_title: 何为一般福利？关于繁荣与公平的福利经济学视角
33376.abstract: Researchers do not know what the framers of the United States Constitution intended when they wrote of the general Welfare. Nevertheless, economists can conjecture by specifying social welfare functions that aim to express the preferences of the population. Economists have often simplified utilitarian analysis of public policy by assuming that individuals have homogeneous, consequentialist, and self-centered preferences. In reality, individuals may hold heterogeneous private and social preferences. To enhance policy analysis, I argue that economists should specify social welfare functions that express the richness and variety of actual personal preferences over social states. The possibilities are vast. I focus on preferences for population prosperity and equity. There has been much controversy regarding interpretation of equity, a term that public discourse has used in vague and conflicting ways. Specifying social welfare functions that formally express different interpretations of equity may not eliminate disagreements, but it should clarify concepts of equity and reduce the inconsistencies that afflict verbal communication.
33376.zh_abstract: 研究者们并不知道美国宪法制定者在撰写“一般福利”一词时的意图。尽管如此，经济学家可以通过设定旨在表达人口偏好的社会福利函数来进行推测。经济学家常常通过假设个体具有同质、后果论且以自我为中心的偏好来简化公共政策的功利主义分析。现实中，个体可能持有异质性的私人偏好和社会偏好。为了加强政策分析，我认为经济学家应该设定能够表达个人对社会状态实际偏好的丰富性和多样性的社会福利函数。可能性是巨大的。我重点关注对人口繁荣和公平的偏好。关于公平的解释一直存在诸多争议，公共话语中对该术语的使用模糊且相互矛盾。设定能够正式表达公平不同解释的社会福利函数可能无法消除分歧，但应能澄清公平的概念，并减少困扰口头沟通的不一致性。

33375.title: The Growth Dividend and Excess Interest
33375.abstract: Standard deficit accounting neglects the growth dividend: the amount by which annual GDP growth shrinks the debt-GDP ratio. America's growth dividend has more than doubled since the Great Recession because the debt ratio has more than doubled, leading to headline deficits that far exceed changes in the debt ratio. Each year's change in the debt ratio can be decomposed into three components: the primary deficit (non-interest spending minus tax revenue), interest payments, and the growth dividend. The sum of the latter two is excess interest: the impact of past debt on the debt ratio, roughly equal to last year's debt ratio times the excess interest rate (r-g)/(1+g) where r is the average nominal interest rate on federal debt and g is the nominal GDP growth rate. Excess interest remains slightly negative in CBO's baseline ten-year projection. Hence, current debt is sustainable in the CBO baseline despite high interest payments, and primary deficits entirely drive the unsustainable projected debt ratio path and provide a good guide for how the debt ratio is projected to change. However, America's higher debt ratio implies higher vulnerability to the risk that the excess interest rate turns persistently positive.
33375.zh_abstract: 标准赤字核算忽略了增长红利：即年度GDP增长使债务-GDP比率缩小的数额。自大衰退以来，美国的增长红利增加了一倍多，因为债务比率增加了一倍多，导致名义赤字远超债务比率的变化。每年债务比率的变化可以分解为三个部分：基本赤字（非利息支出减去税收收入）、利息支付和增长红利。后两者之和为超额利息：即过去债务对债务比率的影响，大致等于去年的债务比率乘以超额利率 (r-g)/(1+g)，其中r是联邦债务的平均名义利率，g是名义GDP增长率。在CBO的十年基线预测中，超额利息仍略为负值。因此，在CBO基线预测中，尽管利息支付很高，但当前债务是可持续的，基本赤字完全驱动了预测中不可持续的债务比率路径，并为债务比率预计如何变化提供了良好指引。然而，美国更高的债务比率意味着对超额利率持续转为正值的风险具有更高的脆弱性。

33374.title: Robust Fiscal Stabilization
33374.abstract: Any fiscal path is sustainable if future fiscal policy responds sufficiently to high deficits. Previous work found that Congress reduced the deficit during 1984-2003 when projected deficits rose. We find that this year-to-year feedback has disappeared: Congress on average during 2004-2024 did not respond to the projected deficit. We quantify how strong fiscal feedback needs to be going forward in order to keep the debt-GDP ratio below 250% in one hundred years, taking as given the debt sensitivity of interest rates implicit in official projections. Without fiscal risk, the government can succeed either by modestly and gradually reducing the deficit or by suddenly and permanently reducing the deficit once this century by 1.5% of GDP. When considering large transitory deficit shocks like the COVID-19 pandemic and persistent interest rate shocks, keeping the debt ratio below 250% with 95% probability requires stronger gradual feedback — 0.5%-1.1% of GDP average deficit reduction in the next decade — though less strong than actually observed during 1984-2003. Successful sudden feedback requires being able to undertake 1.5%-of-GDP deficit reductions twice in thirteen-year periods, suggesting that a “wait-and-see” approach to successful deficit reduction sometimes allows little waiting.
33374.zh_abstract: 如果未来的财政政策对高赤字做出充分反应，任何财政路径都是可持续的。先前的研究发现，在1984-2003年间，当预计赤字上升时，国会会减少赤字。我们发现这种逐年反馈已经消失：在2004-2024年间，国会平均而言并未对预计赤字做出反应。我们量化了未来需要多强的财政反馈，才能在一百年内将债务-GDP比率保持在250%以下，同时假设官方预测中隐含的利率对债务的敏感性。在没有财政风险的情况下，政府可以通过适度逐步减少赤字，或者在本世纪内突然且永久性地将赤字减少GDP的1.5%来取得成功。当考虑像COVID-19大流行这样的大型暂时性赤字冲击和持续性利率冲击时，以95%的概率将债务比率保持在250%以下需要更强的渐进反馈——未来十年平均赤字削减GDP的0.5%-1.1%——尽管强度低于1984-2003年间实际观察到的水平。成功的突发反馈要求能够在十三年期内进行两次相当于GDP 1.5%的赤字削减，这表明成功的赤字削减“观望”方法有时几乎不允许等待。

33373.title: American Life Histories
33373.authors: David Lagakos, Stelios Michalopoulos, Hans-Joachim Voth
33373.abstract: What does it take to live a meaningful life? We exploit a unique corpus of over 1,400 life narratives of older Americans collected by a team of writers during the 1930s. We combine detailed human readings with large language models (LLMs) to extract systematic information on critical junctures, sources of meaning, and overall life satisfaction. Under specific conditions, LLMs can provide responses to complex questions that are indistinguishable from those of human readers, effectively passing a version of the Turing Test. We find that sources of life meaning are more varied than previous research suggested, underlining the importance of work and community contributions in addition to family and close relationships (emphasized by earlier work). The narratives also highlight gendered disparities, with women disproportionately citing adverse family events, such as the loss of a parent, underscoring their role as keepers of the kin. Our research expands our understanding of human flourishing during a transformative period in American history and establishes a robust and scalable framework for exploring subjective well-being across diverse historical and cultural contexts.
33373.zh_abstract: 过上有意义的生活需要什么？我们利用了一个独特的语料库，其中包含1930年代一个作家团队收集的1400多份美国老年人的生活叙事。我们结合详细的人工阅读和大型语言模型（LLMs），来提取关于关键转折点、意义来源和整体生活满意度的系统信息。在特定条件下，LLMs能够对复杂问题提供与人类读者无法区分的回答，有效地通过了图灵测试的一个版本。我们发现，生活意义的来源比先前研究暗示的更加多样化，这突显了工作和社区贡献的重要性，而不仅仅是家庭和亲密关系（早期研究强调的）。这些叙事还突出了性别差异，女性不成比例地提及不利的家庭事件，例如失去父母，这强调了她们作为亲属守护者的角色。我们的研究扩展了我们对美国历史上一个变革时期人类繁荣的理解，并建立了一个稳健且可扩展的框架，用于探索不同历史和文化背景下的主观幸福感。
33373.meta: Programs：AG, CH, DAE, DEV, EFG, POL；JEL：I31, N0, O10, P00, Z10

33372.title: Racial Inequality in the Labor Market
33372.zh_title: 劳动力市场中的种族不平等
33372.authors: Patrick Bayer, Kerwin Kofi Charles, Ellora Derenoncourt
33372.abstract: In this chapter, we introduce a new framework for studying the evolution of racial inequality in the labor market. The framework encompasses two broad forces – distributional and positional – that affect labor market gaps by racial and ethnic identity over time. We provide long-run results on the evolution of Black-White earnings gaps, including new results for Black and White women, and we review the evidence on historical factors affecting racial gaps. We then provide new results on racial gaps among other groups in the U.S. and discuss the evidence on racial gaps outside the U.S. We then discuss the role of prejudice-based discrimination in driving racial gaps, particularly in the post-civil-rights era, a period when such discrimination has been thought to play a declining role in racial inequality. We describe forces that can amplify existing discrimination, such as monopsony and workers’ perceptions of prejudice in the economy, and we discuss recent literature directly measuring discrimination through expanded audit studies and quasi-experimental variation. We conclude with a discussion of existing and new frontiers on race in the labor market, including stratification, reformulations of prejudice, and understanding the way race has shaped purportedly race-neutral institutions throughout the economy.
33372.zh_abstract: 在本章中，我们引入了一个新的框架来研究劳动力市场中种族不平等的演变。该框架涵盖了两种广泛的驱动力——分布性和位置性——它们随着时间的推移影响着按种族和民族身份划分的劳动力市场差距。我们提供了关于黑人与白人收入差距演变的长期结果，包括关于黑人和白人女性的新结果，并回顾了影响种族差距的历史因素的证据。然后，我们提供了关于美国其他群体间种族差距的新结果，并讨论了美国以外种族差距的证据。接着，我们讨论了基于偏见的歧视在驱动种族差距中的作用，特别是在后民权时代，这一时期此类歧视被认为在种族不平等中扮演着日益减弱的角色。我们描述了可能放大现有歧视的力量，例如买方独家垄断和工人对经济中偏见的感知，并讨论了通过扩展的审计研究和准实验变异直接衡量歧视的最新文献。最后，我们讨论了劳动力市场中关于种族的现有和新前沿，包括分层、偏见的重新表述，以及理解种族如何塑造整个经济中表面上种族中立的制度。

33371.title: Welfare Effects of Buyer and Seller Power
33371.zh_title: 买方势力与卖方势力的福利效应
33371.abstract: We provide a theoretical characterization of the welfare effects of buyer and seller power in vertical relations and introduce an empirical approach for quantifying the contributions of each to the welfare losses from market power. Our model accommodates both monopsony distortions from buyer power and double-marginalization distortions from seller power. Rather than imposing one of these vertical distortions by assumption, we let them be determined by a ’conduct selection’ criterion that is based on model primitives. We show that the relative elasticity of upstream supply and downstream demand is the key determinant of whether buyer or seller power creates a market power distortion. Applying our framework to coal procurement by power plants in Texas, we attribute 74.9% of the distortion to monopoly power of coal mines, with the remainder attributed to the monopsony power of power plants.
33371.zh_abstract: 我们提供了垂直关系中买方和卖方势力福利效应的理论刻画，并引入了一种量化各自对市场势力福利损失贡献的实证方法。我们的模型同时包含了买方势力带来的买方垄断扭曲和卖方势力带来的双重加价扭曲。我们不是通过假设来强加这些垂直扭曲中的某一个，而是让它们由一个基于模型原始参数的“行为选择”标准来决定。我们表明，上游供给和下游需求的相对弹性是决定买方势力还是卖方势力产生市场势力扭曲的关键因素。将我们的框架应用于德克萨斯州发电厂的煤炭采购，我们将74.9%的扭曲归因于煤矿的垄断势力，其余部分归因于发电厂的买方垄断势力。

33370.title: The Role of Digital Platforms in Shaping Tech Venture Innovation
33370.zh_title: 数字平台在塑造科技创业创新中的作用
33370.authors: Ginger Zhe Jin, Mario Leccese, Liad Wagman
33370.abstract: This chapter examines the multifaceted interactions between top digital platforms and technology ventures across capital, labor, innovation, and product markets. Exploring how venture investments, talent flows, strategic alliances, and competitive behaviors can shape the innovation ecosystem, the chapter highlights both the complementary and competitive dynamics between large incumbents and smaller entrants, and the benefits and potential inefficiencies that may arise from them, as demonstrated by the empirical and theoretical literatures. Throughout, the chapter identifies key areas for research that can support a rigorous evaluation of policy proposals concerning evolving market structures in the digital economy.
33370.zh_abstract: 本章考察了顶级数字平台与科技创业公司在资本、劳动力、创新和产品市场中的多方面互动。通过探讨风险投资、人才流动、战略联盟和竞争行为如何塑造创新生态系统，本章强调了大型在位企业与小型新进入者之间的互补与竞争动态，以及实证和理论文献所展示的由此可能产生的收益和潜在低效率。贯穿全文，本章指出了关键的研究领域，这些领域可以支持对有关数字经济中不断演变的市场结构的政策提案进行严格评估。

33369.title: Mean Reversion in Randomized Controlled Trials: Implications for Program Targeting and Heterogeneous Treatment Effects
33369.zh_title: 随机对照试验中的均值回归：对项目瞄准和异质性处理效应的启示
33369.authors: Marcella Alsan, John Cawley, Joseph J. Doyle Jr., Nicholas Skelley
33369.abstract: Eligibility criteria for interventions can induce an Ashenfelter Dip, and subsequent mean-reversion may result in improvement over time even absent the intervention. We investigate these dynamics for a food-as-medicine program to treat diabetes, where eligibility required elevated hemoglobin A1c (HbA1c). Both treatment and control groups experienced significant improvements in HbA1c, resulting in an estimated null effect. When we predict improvement using baseline characteristics, we find that subjects unlikely to improve on their own appear to benefit from the program. Our findings have implications for program targeting and estimating heterogeneous treatment effects.
33369.zh_abstract: 干预措施的资格标准可能引发阿申费尔特低谷，随后的均值回归可能导致即使没有干预，随着时间的推移也会出现改善。我们研究了这些动态在一个治疗糖尿病的“食物即药物”项目中的表现，该项目要求糖化血红蛋白（HbA1c）升高才有资格参与。治疗组和对照组的HbA1c都有显著改善，导致估计的效应为零。当我们使用基线特征预测改善时，我们发现那些不太可能自行改善的受试者似乎从该项目中受益。我们的发现对项目瞄准和估计异质性处理效应具有启示意义。

33368.title: Valuing Solar Subsidies
33368.zh_title: 评估太阳能补贴的价值
33368.authors: Bryan Bollinger, Kenneth Gillingham, A. Justin Kirkpatrick
33368.abstract: Individuals trade present for future consumption across a range of economic behaviors, and this tradeoff may differ across socioeconomic groups. To assess these tradeoffs, we estimate a dynamic model of residential solar adoption and system sizing in California using household-level data on solar irradiance, electricity consumption, and electricity rates that offer plausibly exogenous variation in the future benefits from adopting relative to upfront costs. We find implicit discount rates of 15.3%, 13.8%, and 10.0% for low-, medium-, and high-wealth households. Counterfactual simulations demonstrate opportunities to reduce the regressivity of solar adoption, increase policy cost-effectiveness, and improve welfare for low-wealth households.
33368.zh_abstract: 个体在一系列经济行为中权衡现在与未来的消费，而这种权衡可能因社会经济群体而异。为了评估这些权衡，我们利用加州家庭层面的太阳能辐照度、电力消耗和电价数据，估计了一个关于住宅太阳能采用和系统规模的动态模型，这些数据提供了关于采用相对于前期成本的未来收益的看似外生变化。我们发现低财富、中等财富和高财富家庭的隐含贴现率分别为15.3%、13.8%和10.0%。反事实模拟表明，存在减少太阳能采用累退性、提高政策成本效益以及改善低财富家庭福利的机会。

33367.title: Modernizing Access to Credit for Younger Entrepreneurs: From FICO to Cash Flow
33367.zh_title: 为年轻创业者现代化信贷准入：从FICO到现金流
33367.authors: Christopher M. Hair, Sabrina T. Howell, Mark J. Johnson, Siena Matsumoto
33367.abstract: Younger entrepreneurs are disadvantaged by the common practice of relying on personal credit scores to underwrite small business loans. In causal analysis exploiting within-applicant assignment to multiple lenders, we show that younger business owners have a higher chance of loan approval when the lender incorporates recent cash flows from business checking accounts. We present a new method—Tail Analysis for Comparative Outcomes (TACO)—to assess, in a nonparametric way, who benefits from alternative models. This method is especially useful for evaluating machine learning models. We show that incorporating cash flow data into default prediction models disproportionately benefits younger entrepreneurs.
33367.zh_abstract: 年轻创业者因依赖个人信用评分来承保小企业贷款的普遍做法而处于不利地位。在利用申请人内部分配给多个贷款机构的因果分析中，我们表明，当贷款机构纳入来自企业支票账户的近期现金流时，年轻企业主获得贷款批准的概率更高。我们提出了一种新方法——比较结果的尾部分析（TACO）——以非参数方式评估谁从替代模型中受益。该方法对于评估机器学习模型尤其有用。我们表明，将现金流数据纳入违约预测模型会不成比例地惠及年轻创业者。
33367.meta: Programs：AG, CF, PR；JEL：G21, G23, G32, J14, J16

33366.title: We Are Not in a Gaussian World Anymore: Implications for the Composition of Official Foreign Assets
33366.zh_title: 我们不再处于高斯世界：对官方外汇资产构成的启示
33366.authors: José Andrée Camarena, Juan Pablo Medina, Daniel Riera-Crichton, Carlos A. Vegh, Guillermo Vuletin
33366.abstract: In the aftermath of the 1997-98 Asian crises, many emerging markets self-insured by accumulating international reserves (i.e., non-contingent assets) in excess of what many models predicted, while relying relatively little on state-contingent assets. This apparent over-reliance on self-insurance has been viewed as a puzzle in search of an explanation. A related, and still outstanding, puzzle is why the benefits of financial liberalization appear to be quite small and, yet, financial globalization has been unprecedented in recent decades. We show that these two puzzles can be solved by incorporating rare macroeconomic disasters in income risk. To this effect, we first fit a fat-tailed distribution to long output time series for 156 countries. We then develop a theoretical framework to quantify (i) the increase in welfare gains of financial integration and (ii) how the composition of official reserves (non-contingent and contingent) responds to bigger shocks. Our results show that fat tails lead to a sharp increase in both the gains of financial integration and self-insurance for standard values of the coefficient of risk aversion.
33366.zh_abstract: 在1997-98年亚洲危机之后，许多新兴市场通过积累超出许多模型预测的国际储备（即非或有资产）进行自我保险，而对或有资产的依赖相对较少。这种对自我保险的明显过度依赖被视为一个有待解释的谜题。另一个相关且仍未解决的谜题是，为什么金融自由化的收益似乎相当小，然而近几十年来金融全球化却前所未有。我们表明，通过将收入风险中的罕见宏观经济灾难纳入考虑，可以解决这两个谜题。为此，我们首先为156个国家的长期产出时间序列拟合了一个厚尾分布。然后，我们开发了一个理论框架来量化（i）金融一体化福利收益的增加，以及（ii）官方储备（非或有和或有）的构成如何应对更大的冲击。我们的结果表明，对于标准风险厌恶系数值，厚尾导致金融一体化和自我保险的收益都急剧增加。

33365.title: A Different World: Enduring Effects of School Desegregation on Ideology and Attitudes
33365.zh_title: 一个不同的世界：学校废除种族隔离对意识形态和态度的持久影响
33365.authors: Ethan Kaplan, Jorg L. Spenkuch, Cody Tuttle
33365.abstract: In 1975, a federal court ordered the desegregation of public schools in Jefferson County, KY. In order to approximately equalize the share of minorities across schools, students were assigned to a busing schedule that depended on the first letter of their last name. We use the resulting quasi-random variation to estimate the long-run impact of attending an inner-city school on political participation and preferences among whites. Drawing on administrative voter registration records and an original survey, we find that being bused to an inner-city school significantly increases support for the Democratic Party and its candidates more than forty years later. Consistent with the idea that exposure to an inner-city environment causes a permanent change in ideological outlook, we also find evidence that bused individuals are much less likely to believe in a “just world” (i.e., that success is earned rather than attributable to luck) and, more tentatively, that they become more supportive of some forms of redistribution. Taken together, our findings imply that witnessing economic deprivation can durably sensitize individuals to issues of inequality and fairness.
33365.zh_abstract: 1975年，联邦法院下令废除肯塔基州杰斐逊县公立学校的种族隔离。为了大致平衡各校的少数族裔比例，学生被分配到一个取决于其姓氏首字母的校车接送计划。我们利用由此产生的准随机变异来估计就读市中心学校对白人政治参与和偏好的长期影响。根据行政选民登记记录和一项原始调查，我们发现，被校车送往市中心学校显著增加了四十多年后对民主党及其候选人的支持。与接触市中心环境会导致意识形态观永久改变的观点一致，我们还发现证据表明，被校车接送的人不太可能相信“公正世界”（即成功是靠努力而非运气获得的），并且（更初步地）他们变得更加支持某些形式的再分配。总的来说，我们的发现意味着目睹经济贫困可以持久地使个人对不平等和公平问题敏感化。
33365.meta: Programs：DAE, ED, LS, PE, POL；JEL：D72, H75, I21, I28, J15, N32

33364.title: Does Unilateral Decarbonization Pay For Itself?
33364.zh_title: 单边脱碳能否收回成本？
33364.abstract: This paper shows that unilateral decarbonization pays for itself in large economies. We estimate economic damages from global temperature shocks and combine them with a climate-economy model to construct Domestic Costs of Carbon: $\$226$ per ton for the United States and $\$216$ per ton for the European Union. When compared to marginal abatement costs, these values imply over 80% unilateral decarbonization for both economies, an order of magnitude larger than under conventional damages estimated based on local temperature.
33364.zh_abstract: 本文表明，在大型经济体中，单边脱碳可以收回成本。我们估算了全球温度冲击造成的经济损失，并将其与一个气候-经济模型相结合，构建了国内碳成本：美国为每吨226美元，欧盟为每吨216美元。与边际减排成本相比，这些数值意味着两个经济体均可实现超过80%的单边脱碳，其规模比基于当地温度估算的传统损失所隐含的规模大一个数量级。
33364.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG, IFM；JEL：E01, E23, F18, O44, Q54, Q56

33363.title: AI-Powered (Finance) Scholarship
33363.zh_title: 人工智能驱动的（金融）学术研究
33363.abstract: This paper describes a process for automatically generating academic finance papers using large language models (LLMs). It demonstrates the process’ efficacy by producing hundreds of complete papers on stock return predictability, a topic particularly well-suited for our illustration. We first mine over 30,000 potential stock return predictor signals from accounting data, and apply the Novy-Marx and Velikov (2024) “Assaying Anomalies” protocol to generate standardized “template reports” for 96 signals that pass the protocol’s rigorous criteria. Each report details a signal’s performance predicting stock returns using a wide array of tests and benchmarks it to more than 200 other known anomalies. Finally, we use state-of-the-art LLMs to generate three distinct complete versions of academic papers for each signal. The different versions include creative names for the signals, contain custom introductions providing different theoretical justifications for the observed predictability patterns, and incorporate citations to existing (and, on occasion, imagined) literature supporting their respective claims. This experiment illustrates AI’s potential for enhancing financial research efficiency, but also serves as a cautionary tale, illustrating how it can be abused to industrialize HARKing (Hypothesizing After Results are Known).
33363.zh_abstract: 本文描述了一种使用大型语言模型自动生成金融学术论文的流程。通过生成数百篇关于股票收益可预测性的完整论文（这一主题特别适合我们的演示），我们展示了该流程的有效性。我们首先从会计数据中挖掘出超过30,000个潜在的股票收益预测信号，并应用Novy-Marx和Velikov（2024）的“异常检测”协议，为通过该协议严格标准的96个信号生成标准化的“模板报告”。每份报告都详细说明了信号在使用一系列测试预测股票收益方面的表现，并将其与超过200个其他已知异常现象进行基准比较。最后，我们使用最先进的大型语言模型为每个信号生成三个不同的完整论文版本。不同的版本包括为信号起的创意名称，包含提供对观察到的可预测性模式不同理论解释的定制引言，并引用支持其各自主张的现有（有时是虚构的）文献。这个实验展示了人工智能在提高金融研究效率方面的潜力，但也作为一个警示故事，说明了它如何被滥用来工业化地实施“事后假设”（HARKing）。
33363.meta: Programs：AP, CF；JEL：A12, C12, C18, C45, G11, G12

33362.title: Enclaves and Assimilation in the Age of Mass Migration: Evidence from Ethnic Catholic Churches
33362.zh_title: 大规模移民时代的飞地与同化：来自族裔天主教教堂的证据
33362.authors: Ran Abramitzky, Leah Platt Boustan, Osea Giuntella
33362.abstract: Immigrant enclaves offer valuable ethnic amenities but may delay assimilation. We study enclave formation in the Age of Mass Migration by using the centralized location decisions for “ethnic” Catholic churches. After a church opening, same-ethnicity residents of chosen neighborhoods experienced falling earnings but strengthened communal ties, as compared to residents of areas matched on baseline characteristics. Treated residents held more manual occupations, and increased in-group marriage and naming. These effects persist into the second generation and are not observed for non-ethnic neighbors. Consistent with the historical record, Poles organized communal life around neighborhood parishes, but Italians were less church-centered.
33362.zh_abstract: 移民飞地提供宝贵的族裔便利设施，但可能延迟同化。我们通过利用“族裔”天主教教堂的集中选址决策来研究大规模移民时代的飞地形成。与基于基线特征匹配的地区的居民相比，在教堂开设后，所选社区的同族裔居民经历了收入下降但社区联系加强。受处理的居民从事更多体力劳动职业，并增加了族内通婚和命名。这些影响持续到第二代，并且未在非族裔邻居中观察到。与历史记录一致，波兰人围绕社区教区组织社区生活，但意大利人则不那么以教堂为中心。

33361.title: Nature Loss and Climate Change: The Twin-Crises Multiplier
33361.zh_title: 自然丧失与气候变化：双重危机乘数
33361.authors: Stefano Giglio, Theresa Kuchler, Johannes Stroebel, Olivier Wang
33361.abstract: We study the economic effects of the interaction of nature loss and climate change in a model that incorporates important aspects of both processes. We capture the distinct ways in which they affect economic activity—with nature constituting a key factor of production and climate change destroying parts of output—but also the ways in which they interact: climate change causes nature loss, and nature provides both a carbon sink and adaptation tools to reduce climate damages. Our analysis of these feedback loops reveals a novel amplification channel—the Twin-Crises Multiplier—that systematically affects optimal climate and nature conservation policies.
33361.zh_abstract: 我们在一个模型中研究了自然丧失与气候变化相互作用的 economic 效应，该模型纳入了这两个过程的重要方面。我们捕捉了它们影响经济活动的不同方式——自然构成关键生产要素，气候变化破坏部分产出——但也捕捉了它们相互作用的方式：气候变化导致自然丧失，而自然既提供碳汇也提供适应工具以减少气候损害。我们对这些反馈循环的分析揭示了一个新的放大渠道——双重危机乘数——它系统地影响了最优的气候和自然保护政策。
33361.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EEE, EFG, ME, PE；JEL：G0, Q2, Q20, Q3, Q38, Q5, Q50

33360.title: Gun Policy and the Steel Paradox: Evidence from Oregunians
33360.zh_title: 枪支政策与钢铁悖论：来自俄勒冈州的证据
33360.authors: Katie Bollman, Benjamin Hansen, Edward A. Rubin, Garrett O. Stanford
33360.abstract: Using Measure 114’s narrow passage in Oregon as a natural experiment, we study how new gun regulations affect firearm demand. Background checks, a proxy for demand, rose 13.9% in anticipation of the referendum and surged 157% immediately following the election. After judicial intervention halted the law’s enactment, demand returned near pre-election levels. Temporal displacement/harvesting does not explain the demand spike: after eighteen months, we still observe a substantial cumulative increase of 63,000 excess firearm-related background checks. Administrative data reveal significant county-level heterogeneity. This evidence underscores the paradoxical effect of gun-control policies, offering a cautionary lesson to policymakers.
33360.zh_abstract: 利用俄勒冈州第114号措施以微弱优势通过作为自然实验，我们研究了新的枪支法规如何影响枪支需求。作为需求代理变量的背景调查，在公投预期中上升了13.9%，并在选举后立即飙升了157%。在司法干预阻止该法律生效后，需求恢复到接近选举前水平。时间性转移/收割效应无法解释需求激增：十八个月后，我们仍然观察到累计增加了63,000次超额枪支相关背景调查。行政数据显示了显著的县级异质性。这些证据强调了控枪政策的悖论效应，为政策制定者提供了警示。

33359.title: Survivors' Mental Health and the Protective Role of Income Stability
33359.zh_title: 幸存者的心理健康与收入稳定的保护作用
33359.authors: Itzik Fadlon, Astrid Sophie Fugleholm, Torben Heien Nielsen
33359.abstract: We use administrative records on the healthcare utilization and economic outcomes of the universe of Danish households to characterize survivors' mental health following their spouse's death. We provide visually clear evidence for the inevitable immediate, large, and lingering adverse impacts and focus on studying the role of potential mediators: economic conditions and the presence of children. We find no evidence of heterogeneity in family composition. As for economic outcomes, baseline levels of income and net wealth play only a modest role: there is no meaningful cross-household inequality gradient in mental health declines, so that spousal death is devastating for both the rich and the poor. Rather, a key source of heterogeneity in the decline in mental health is the household's degree of income insurance, that is, the within-household income variation. Specifically, the least-insured households experience an immediate decline in mental health that is 80 percent larger. Our findings suggest that the consumption smoothing welfare gains from income protection policies can have important spillovers to improved mental health in the context of severe household events.
33359.zh_abstract: 我们利用丹麦所有家庭的医疗保健利用和经济结果的行政记录，来描述配偶去世后幸存者的心理健康状况。我们提供了视觉上清晰的证据，证明其不可避免的、即时的、巨大的和持续的不利影响，并重点研究了潜在中介因素的作用：经济状况和子女的存在。我们没有发现家庭构成存在异质性的证据。至于经济结果，收入和净财富的基线水平只起到 modest 作用：心理健康下降方面不存在有意义的跨家庭不平等梯度，因此配偶去世对富人和穷人都是毁灭性的。相反，心理健康下降异质性的一个关键来源是家庭的收入保险程度，即家庭内部的收入波动。具体来说，保险程度最低的家庭心理健康立即下降的幅度要大80%。我们的发现表明，在严重家庭事件的背景下，收入保护政策带来的消费平滑福利收益可以对改善心理健康产生重要的溢出效应。
33359.meta: Programs：AG, CH, EH, LS, PE；JEL：D1, H5, I1, I3, J1

33399.title: Pricing Inequality
33399.abstract: This paper studies household inequality and product market power in dynamic, general equilibrium. In our model, households’ price elasticities of demand endogenously vary with wealth. Heterogeneous firms set their price as oligopolistic competitors given the endogenous distribution of demand. A firm’s market power varies with the distribution of demand as households with different elasticities sort into high- and low-price varieties. Under standard preferences, larger firms’ products are more appealing, sell at higher prices, to more households, and a relatively richer customer base, face less elastic demand, and set higher markups. Quantitatively (a) our model rationalizes a wide set of recent empirical studies in the cross-section of households and firms, (b) we find household heterogeneity to be a dominant source of markup variation across firms, and (c) a one-time fiscal transfer of one percent of GDP to households leads to a 0.3 percentage point increase in the aggregate markup.
33399.zh_abstract: 本文研究动态一般均衡中的家庭不平等与产品市场势力。在我们的模型中，家庭的需求价格弹性随财富内生变化。异质性企业作为寡头竞争者，根据内生的需求分布设定价格。企业的市场势力随需求分布而变化，因为具有不同弹性的家庭会分入高价和低价品种。在标准偏好下，规模较大企业的产品更具吸引力，以更高价格销售给更多家庭，且客户基础相对更富裕，面临的需求弹性更低，从而设定更高的加成率。定量分析表明：(a) 我们的模型解释了近期大量关于家庭和企业横截面的实证研究；(b) 我们发现家庭异质性是跨企业加成率变化的主要来源；(c) 一次性向家庭转移相当于GDP 1%的财政资金，会导致总体加成率上升0.3个百分点。
33399.meta: Programs：EFG, IO, PR；JEL：E0, E27, E3, E60, L0, L10

33398.title: Human Capital Impacts of In Utero Exposure to War Conflict in Afghanistan
33398.zh_title: 阿富汗战争冲突的产前暴露对人力资本的影响
33398.authors: Erkmen G. Aslim, Rafiuddin Najam, Erdal Tekin
33398.abstract: This study examines the long-term effects of prenatal exposure to war violence on cognitive and developmental outcomes, focusing on children in Afghanistan, a country deeply affected by prolonged violent conflict. Using data from the 2022 Afghanistan Multiple Indicator Cluster Surveys and geo-referenced information on violent incidents, we estimate the effects of prenatal exposure to civilian casualties on educational attainment, math performance, and functional and disciplinary outcomes. Our findings reveal significant gender disparities, with girls exposed in utero demonstrating substantially worse cognitive and developmental outcomes compared to boys, including lower school attendance, reduced math performance, and increased functional difficulties. These adverse effects appear to be driven by disruptions in foundational cognitive skills during critical developmental periods. Post-birth exposure, while negatively affecting both genders, has less pronounced and consistent effects. These results highlight the intergenerational consequences of war conflict, emphasizing the need for interventions that address the unique vulnerabilities of children in conflict-affected regions.
33398.zh_abstract: 本研究考察了产前暴露于战争暴力对认知和发展结果的长期影响，重点关注阿富汗这个深受长期暴力冲突影响的国家的儿童。利用2022年阿富汗多指标类集调查数据和地理编码的暴力事件信息，我们估计了产前暴露于平民伤亡对教育成就、数学成绩以及功能性和纪律性结果的影响。我们的发现揭示了显著的性别差异：与男孩相比，在子宫内暴露的女孩的认知和发展结果明显更差，包括更低的入学率、更差的数学成绩以及更多的功能性困难。这些不利影响似乎是由关键发育时期基础认知技能的中断所驱动的。出生后暴露虽然对两性都有负面影响，但其影响不那么显著和一致。这些结果凸显了战争冲突的代际后果，强调了需要针对受冲突影响地区儿童的独特脆弱性进行干预。
33398.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, EH；JEL：D74, I15, I25, O15

33397.title: Optimal Estimation of Discrete Choice Demand Models with Consumer and Product Data
33397.zh_title: 利用消费者和产品数据对离散选择需求模型的最优估计
33397.authors: Paul L. E. Grieco, Charles Murry, Joris Pinkse, Stephan Sagl
33397.abstract: We propose a conformant likelihood estimator with exogeneity restrictions (CLEER) for random coefficients discrete choice demand models that is applicable in a broad range of data settings. It combines the likelihoods of two mixed logit estimators—one for consumer level data, and one for product level data—with product level exogeneity restrictions. Our estimator is both efficient and conformant: its rates of convergence will be the fastest possible given the variation available in the data. The researcher does not need to pre-test or adjust the estimator and the inference procedure is valid across a wide variety of scenarios. Moreover, it can be tractably applied to large datasets. We illustrate the features of our estimator by comparing it to alternatives in the literature.
33397.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种带有外生性约束的符合似然估计量（CLEER），用于随机系数离散选择需求模型，该估计量适用于广泛的数据环境。它将两个混合logit估计量的似然函数——一个用于消费者层面数据，一个用于产品层面数据——与产品层面的外生性约束相结合。我们的估计量既有效又符合：其收敛速度将是给定数据中可用变异下的最快速度。研究者无需预先检验或调整该估计量，且推断程序在多种情景下均有效。此外，它可以易于处理地应用于大型数据集。我们通过将其与文献中的替代方法进行比较来说明我们估计量的特征。

33396.title: Bargaining and Inequality in the Labor Market
33396.zh_title: 劳动力市场中的讨价还价与不平等
33396.authors: Sydnee Caldwell, Ingrid Haegele, Jörg Heining
33396.abstract: We use novel surveys of firms and workers, linked to administrative employer-employee data, to study the prevalence and importance of individual bargaining in wage determination. We show that simple survey questions accurately elicit firms’ bargaining strategies. Using the elicited strategies for 772 German firms, we document that the majority of firms are willing to engage in individual wage bargaining. Labor market factors predict firms’ strategies better than firm characteristics. Survey responses from nearly 10,000 full-time workers indicate that most worker-firm interactions begin with the worker providing their salary expectations. Most interactions end with the worker rejecting the offer and remaining at the incumbent firm. There is substantial heterogeneity in workers’ bargaining behavior, which translates into within-firm wage inequality. Firms that set pay via individual bargaining have a 3 percentage point higher gender wage gap.
33396.zh_abstract: 我们利用对企业与工人的新颖调查，并将其与行政雇主-雇员数据相关联，来研究个体讨价还价在工资决定中的普遍性和重要性。我们表明，简单的调查问题能够准确地揭示企业的讨价还价策略。利用为772家德国企业引出的策略，我们记录了大多数企业愿意进行个体工资讨价还价。劳动力市场因素比企业特征更能预测企业的策略。来自近10,000名全职员工的调查回复表明，大多数工人与企业的互动始于工人提供他们的薪资期望。大多数互动以工人拒绝报价并留在原企业而告终。工人的讨价还价行为存在显著的异质性，这转化为企业内部的工资不平等。通过个体讨价还价设定薪酬的企业，其性别工资差距高出3个百分点。

33395.title: From Fiscal Deadlock to Financial Repression: Anatomy of a Fall
33395.zh_title: 从财政僵局到金融压抑：衰落剖析
33395.abstract: Financial repression can be used to avoid a government default when fiscal policy is constrained. We present a model showing that optimal financial repression progresses through successive stages with increasing levels of distortion. Data from advanced economies suggest that the initial stage of financial repression typically begins when government debt exceeds 100% to 120% of GDP. Moreover, Japan’s experience suggests that countries such as the U.S. have significant leeway before resorting to the most distortive forms of financial repression.
33395.zh_abstract: 当财政政策受到约束时，金融压抑可用于避免政府违约。我们提出了一个模型，表明最优的金融压抑会经历连续阶段，扭曲程度逐级递增。来自发达经济体的数据表明，金融压抑的初始阶段通常始于政府债务超过GDP的100%至120%时。此外，日本的经验表明，像美国这样的国家在诉诸最具扭曲性的金融压抑形式之前，仍有相当大的回旋余地。
33395.meta: Programs：IFM；JEL：E58, E59, E6, E62, F38, G01, G28

33394.title: Passing as White: Racial Identity and Old-Age Longevity
33394.zh_title: 冒充白人：种族身份与老年长寿
33394.abstract: In the presence of segregation and discrimination during the late 19th and early 20th century, many African American men changed their racial identity and “passed” for white. Previous studies have suggested that this activity was associated with increases in income and socioeconomic status despite the costs associated with cutting ties with their black communities. This study adds to this literature by evaluating the long-run effects of passing on old-age longevity. We construct longitudinal data of black families in historical censuses (1880-1940) linked to their male children’s Social Security Administration death records (1975-2005). We use family fixed effects to demonstrate that individuals passing as white live approximately 9.4 months longer, on average, than their non-passing siblings. Additional analyses suggest substantial improvements in education and occupational standing scores as well as differential parental investments as potential pathways.
33394.zh_abstract: 在19世纪末和20世纪初存在种族隔离和歧视的情况下，许多非裔美国男性改变了他们的种族身份，“冒充”白人。先前的研究表明，尽管与切断与黑人社区联系相关的成本存在，但这种行为与收入和经济社会地位的提高有关。本研究通过评估冒充白人对老年长寿的长期影响，为这一文献做出了贡献。我们构建了历史人口普查（1880-1940年）中黑人家庭的纵向数据，并将其与其男性子女的社会保障管理局死亡记录（1975-2005年）相关联。我们使用家庭固定效应来证明，冒充白人的个体平均比其未冒充白人的兄弟姐妹多活约9.4个月。进一步的分析表明，教育和职业地位得分的显著改善以及差异化的父母投资是可能的传导途径。
33394.meta: Programs：AG, EH；JEL：I1, I14, J1, J15, N0, N32, N33

33393.title: Winning the Bread and Baking it Too: Gendered Frictions in the Allocation of Home Production
33393.zh_title: 既赚钱又持家：家务分配中的性别摩擦
33393.authors: Kyle Hancock, Jeanne Lafortune, Corinne Low
33393.abstract: We document that female breadwinners do more home production than their male partners, driven by “housework” like cooking and cleaning. By comparing to same sex couples, we highlight that specialization within heterosexual households does not appear to be “gender neutral” even after accounting for average earnings differences. One possible explanation would be a large comparative advantage in housework by women, a supposition commonly used to match aggregate labor supply statistics. Using a model, we show that while comparative advantage can match some stylized facts about how couples divide housework, it fails to match others, particularly that men’s housework time is inelastic to relative household wages. Matching these facts requires some gendered wedge between the opportunity cost of housework time and its assignment within the household. We then turn to the implications for household formation. Gendered rigidities in the allocation of household tasks result in lower surplus for couples where women out-earn men, providing a microfounded reason for substantial literature showing that lower relative earning by men decreases marriage rates. We show this mechanism—allocation of housework, rather than norms about earnings—plays a role by relating marriage rates to home production allocation in US immigrants’ countries of origin.
33393.zh_abstract: 我们记录到，女性养家者比其男性伴侣承担更多的家务劳动，这主要由烹饪和清洁等“家务活”驱动。通过比较同性伴侣，我们强调，即使在考虑了平均收入差异之后，异性恋家庭内部的专业化分工似乎也并非“性别中立的”。一种可能的解释是女性在家务方面具有巨大的比较优势，这一假设常被用来匹配总体劳动供给统计数据。通过使用一个模型，我们表明，虽然比较优势可以匹配夫妻如何分配家务的一些典型事实，但它无法匹配其他事实，特别是男性的家务时间对相对家庭工资缺乏弹性。匹配这些事实需要在家庭内部家务时间的机会成本与其分配之间存在某种性别楔子。然后，我们转向对家庭形成的影响。家务分配中的性别刚性导致女性收入高于男性的伴侣剩余较低，这为大量文献表明男性相对收入较低会降低结婚率提供了一个微观基础。我们通过将结婚率与美国移民原籍国的家务生产分配联系起来，表明这一机制——家务分配，而非关于收入的规范——发挥了作用。

33392.title: Crisis Bargaining with Collective Decision Making
33392.zh_title: 集体决策下的危机谈判
33392.authors: Jeongbin Kim, Thomas R. Palfrey, Jeffrey Zeidel
33392.abstract: Crisis bargaining games are widely used to analyze bilateral conflicts, featuring strategic bluffing akin to poker. Players risk substantial losses from overplaying their hand but can secure significant gains if their opponent concedes. Since decisions in crises typically emerge from collective decision processes within organizations composed of diverse individual members, we use the team equilibrium solution concept to analyze these games, providing a framework for group strategic decision-making under collective choice rules (Kim, et al. 2022). In a team equilibrium, group members have rational expectations about opponents' strategies and share common average payoffs, with private payoff perturbations. Voting rules determine group decisions, assuming optimal voting behavior. Depending on the payoff structure, collective choice rules can lead to more or less bluffing and varying aggression compared to Perfect Bayesian Equilibrium. Our experiment varies game payoffs, group size, and voting rules. Behavior is inconsistent with Perfect Bayesian Equilibrium but broadly consistent with team equilibrium predictions.
33392.zh_abstract: 危机谈判博弈被广泛用于分析双边冲突，其特点是类似于扑克牌游戏中的战略性虚张声势。玩家可能因过度出牌而遭受重大损失，但如果对手认输，则可以获得显著收益。由于危机中的决策通常源于由不同个体成员组成的组织内部的集体决策过程，我们使用团队均衡概念来分析这些博弈，为集体选择规则下的群体战略决策提供了一个框架（Kim等人，2022）。在团队均衡中，群体成员对对手的策略有理性预期，并共享共同的平均收益，但存在私人收益扰动。投票规则决定群体决策，假设投票行为是最优的。根据收益结构的不同，与完美贝叶斯均衡相比，集体选择规则可能导致更多或更少的虚张声势以及不同程度的攻击性。我们的实验改变了博弈收益、群体规模和投票规则。行为与完美贝叶斯均衡不一致，但与团队均衡预测大致相符。

33391.title: Toward an Understanding of Discrimination When Multiple Channels Exist
33391.zh_title: 理解存在多重渠道时的歧视现象
33391.authors: Majid Ahmadi, Gwen-Jirō Clochard, Jeff Lachman, John A. List
33391.abstract: When multiple forces potentially underlie discriminatory behavior, pinning down the precise sources becomes a challenge, making proposed policy solutions speculative. This study introduces an empirical approach, tightly linked to theory, to dissect two specific channels of discrimination: customer bias and managerial bias. To illustrate our framework, we integrate proprietary data with several publicly available datasets to uncover channels of discrimination within the Major League Baseball draft. Our analysis reveals that customer preferences significantly influence the drafting of players at the top end of the draft—those likely to gain immediate public attention and eventually play for the club. Conversely, we observe managerial homophily in the latter parts of the draft, where players who attract little attention and have minimal chances of playing for the club are selected. The observed preferential bias at both ends of the draft incurs a substantial opportunity cost. However, bias at the top end unduly affects competitiveness. Our findings provide significant implications for future research on measuring discrimination and addressing the challenge of multiple channels.
33391.zh_abstract: 当多种力量可能构成歧视行为的基础时，确定其确切来源就成了一项挑战，这使得提出的政策解决方案具有推测性。本研究引入了一种与理论紧密联系的实证方法，以剖析歧视的两个特定渠道：顾客偏见和管理者偏见。为了说明我们的框架，我们将专有数据与几个公开可用的数据集相结合，以揭示美国职业棒球大联盟选秀中的歧视渠道。我们的分析显示，顾客偏好显著影响了选秀顶端球员的选拔——这些球员很可能立即获得公众关注并最终为俱乐部效力。相反，我们在选秀的后半部分观察到管理者同质性，此时选拔的是那些吸引很少关注且为俱乐部效力的机会极小的球员。在选秀两端观察到的偏好偏见都带来了巨大的机会成本。然而，顶端的偏见过度影响了竞争力。我们的发现为未来关于衡量歧视和应对多重渠道挑战的研究提供了重要启示。

33390.title: Currency Development Through Liquidity Provision
33390.zh_title: 通过流动性供给实现货币发展
33390.authors: Antonio Coppola, Arvind Krishnamurthy, Chenzi Xu
33390.abstract: Drawing on the experiences of the historical Eurodollar market and recent Chinese dollar bond issuances traded outside U.S. jurisdiction at negative spreads to Treasurys, we examine the conditions under which a parallel offshore dollar financial system that circumvents Western sanctions may emerge. We propose a model in which currency use is driven by liquidity provision and safe bond supply. We characterize three equilibrium regimes: high convenience yields emerge in both the initial sanctions-driven region and the final liquidity-driven region, separated by an intermediate region. Transitions between equilibria depend on safe-asset supply and liquidity technologies, in addition to endogenous dynamic complementarities.
33390.zh_abstract: 借鉴历史上欧洲美元市场的经验以及近期在美国管辖范围外交易、利差为负的中国美元债券发行，我们研究了可能规避西方制裁的平行离岸美元金融体系出现的条件。我们提出了一个模型，其中货币使用由流动性供给和安全债券供给驱动。我们刻画了三种均衡状态：在最初的制裁驱动区域和最终的流动性驱动区域，都会出现高便利收益率，两者之间由一个中间区域隔开。均衡之间的转换取决于安全资产供给和流动性技术，以及内生的动态互补性。
33390.meta: Programs：DAE, IFM, POL；JEL：F33, F36, G20, N24

33389.title: How Test Optional Policies in College Admissions Disproportionately Harm High Achieving Applicants from Disadvantaged Backgrounds
33389.zh_title: 大学招生中的可选考试政策如何不成比例地伤害来自弱势背景的高成就申请者
33389.authors: Bruce Sacerdote, Douglas O. Staiger, Michele Tine
33389.abstract: We find that test score optional policies harm the likelihood of elite college admission for high achieving applicants from disadvantaged backgrounds. We show that at one elite college campus, SAT (and ACT) scores predict first year college GPA equally well across income and other demographic groups; high school GPA and class rank offer little additional predictive power. Under test score optional policies, less advantaged applicants who are high achieving submit test scores at too low a rate, significantly reducing their admissions chances; such applicants increase their admissions probability by a factor of 3.6x (from 2.9 percent to 10.2 percent) when they report their scores. High achieving first-generation applicants raise admissions chances by 2.4x by reporting scores. Much more than commonly understood, elite institutions interpret test scores in the context of background, and availability of test scores on an application can promote rather than hinder social mobility.
33389.zh_abstract: 我们发现，可选考试成绩政策损害了来自弱势背景的高成就申请者进入精英大学的可能性。我们表明，在一所精英大学校园内，SAT（和ACT）分数在预测大学一年级平均绩点方面，在不同收入和其他人口群体之间同样有效；高中平均绩点和班级排名几乎没有额外的预测能力。在可选考试成绩政策下，处于弱势的高成就申请者提交考试成绩的比例过低，显著降低了他们的录取机会；这类申请者在报告其分数时，其录取概率提高了3.6倍（从2.9%提高到10.2%）。高成就的第一代大学生通过报告分数将录取机会提高了2.4倍。与普遍理解的情况大不相同，精英机构会在背景背景下解读考试成绩，而申请中考试成绩的可获得性可以促进而非阻碍社会流动性。

33388.title: Is There Intersectional Labor Market Discrimination?
33388.zh_title: 存在交叉性劳动力市场歧视吗？
33388.abstract: We present new and rich evidence on intersectional discrimination in labor markets, focusing on wages in the traditional residual wage differential approach to discrimination. We interpret “intersectional discrimination” in the framework of interactions, in which discrimination along intersecting dimensions leads to discrimination that exceeds the sum of its parts. We make three contributions. First, we resolve puzzling contradictory findings on intersectional discrimination in existing research in which studies using similar data and methods reaching diametrically opposite conclusions. Second, we extend the analysis of potential intersectional discrimination to more dimensions than have typically been considered in past research. Third, we explore issues of bias in the wage equations we estimate from selection on employment. Our overall conclusion from these different types of evidence is that there is little or no evidence consistent with intersectional discrimination in wage differentials among the large set of groups (and combinations of groups) we study, and indeed, most evidence points in the opposite direction.
33388.zh_abstract: 我们提供了关于劳动力市场中交叉性歧视的新的丰富证据，重点关注传统残差工资差异方法中的工资歧视。我们在交互作用的框架内解释“交叉性歧视”，其中沿交叉维度的歧视导致歧视超过各部分之和。我们做出了三项贡献。首先，我们解决了现有研究中关于交叉性歧视的令人困惑的矛盾发现，在这些研究中，使用相似数据和方法的研究得出了截然相反的结论。其次，我们将潜在交叉性歧视的分析扩展到比过去研究通常考虑的更多维度。第三，我们探讨了因就业选择而导致的我们估计的工资方程中的偏差问题。我们从这些不同类型的证据中得出的总体结论是，在我们研究的大量群体（以及群体组合）中，几乎没有或根本没有证据与工资差异中的交叉性歧视相一致，事实上，大多数证据指向相反的方向。

33387.title: Do Behavioral Frictions Prevent Firms from Adopting Profitable Opportunities?
33387.zh_title: 行为摩擦是否阻碍企业采纳盈利机会？
33387.authors: Paul Gertler, Sean Higgins, Ulrike Malmendier, Waldo Ojeda
33387.abstract: Firms frequently fail to adopt profitable business opportunities even when they do not face informational or liquidity constraints. We explore three behavioral frictions that explain inertia among individuals—present bias, limited memory, and distrust—in a managerial setting. In partnership with a FinTech payments company in Mexico, we randomly offer 33,978 firms the opportunity to pay a lower merchant fee. We vary whether the offer has a deadline, reminder, pre-announced reminder, and the size of the fee reduction. Reminders increase take-up by 15%, suggesting a role of memory. Announced reminders increase take-up by an additional 7%. Survey data reveal the likely mechanism: When the FinTech company follows through with the pre-announced reminder, firms' trust in the offer increases. The deadline does not affect larger firms, implying limited or no present bias, but does increase take-up by 8% for smaller firms. Overall, behavioral frictions contribute significantly to explaining profit-reducing firm behavior.
33387.zh_abstract: 即使企业没有面临信息或流动性约束，它们也常常未能采纳盈利的商业机会。我们在管理环境中探讨了三种解释个体惯性的行为摩擦——现时偏差、有限记忆和不信任。与墨西哥一家金融科技支付公司合作，我们随机向33,978家企业提供了支付更低商户费用的机会。我们改变了报价是否有截止日期、提醒、预先通知的提醒以及费用减免的幅度。提醒使采纳率提高了15%，表明记忆的作用。预先通知的提醒使采纳率额外提高了7%。调查数据揭示了可能的机制：当金融科技公司兑现预先通知的提醒时，企业对报价的信任度增加。截止日期不影响大企业，意味着现时偏差有限或不存在，但确实使小企业的采纳率提高了8%。总体而言，行为摩擦在很大程度上解释了企业减少利润的行为。
33387.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, PR；JEL：D9, G4, M1, O14

33386.title: Demographic Preferences and Income Segregation
33386.authors: Victor Couture, Jonathan I. Dingel, Allison E. Green, Jessie Handbury
33386.abstract: We study how preferences over the demographic composition of co-patrons affects income segregation in shared spaces. To distinguish demographic preferences from tastes for other venue attributes, we study venue choices within business chains. We find two notable regularities: preferences for high-income co-patrons are similar across racial groups, and racial homophily does not vary by income. These demographic preferences are economically large, explain much of the cross-group variation in exposure to high-income co-patrons, and correlate with movers' neighborhood choices.
33386.zh_abstract: 我们研究了对共同顾客人口构成结构的偏好如何影响共享空间中的收入隔离。为了将人口偏好与对其他场所属性的品味区分开来，我们研究了连锁企业内的场所选择。我们发现了两个显著的规律：不同种族群体对高收入共同顾客的偏好相似，且种族同质性不随收入变化。这些人口偏好在经济上影响巨大，解释了跨群体在高收入共同顾客接触度上的大部分差异，并与迁移者的社区选择相关。
33386.meta: Programs：IO, ITI；JEL：C55, D12, J1, L8, R2, R4

33385.title: Fiscal Progressivity of the U.S. Federal and State Governments
33385.zh_title: 美国联邦与州政府的财政累进性
33385.authors: Johannes Fleck, Jonathan Heathcote, Kjetil Storesletten, Giovanni L. Violante
33385.abstract: Combining a variety of survey and administrative data, this paper measures the progressivity of taxes and transfers at the U.S. federal level and separately for each state. The findings are as follows. (i) The federal tax and transfer system is progressive. (ii) State and local tax and transfer systems are close to proportional, on average. (iii) There is substantial heterogeneity in tax levels and tax progressivity across states. (iv) States that are funded mostly by sales and property taxes tend to have regressive tax systems and low average tax rates. States that are funded mostly by income taxes tend to have progressive tax systems and high average tax rates. (v) Regressive states are concentrated in the South and attract more inter-state net migration, especially of high-income migrants. (vi) State progressivity has remained broadly stable between 2005 and 2016. (vii) Incorporating corporate income and business taxes decreases average state progressivity but increases federal progressivity. (viii) Including spending on public goods and services as a transfer has a large positive impact on measured progressivity.
33385.zh_abstract: 结合多种调查和行政数据，本文衡量了美国联邦层面以及各州单独的税收和转移支付的累进性。研究结果如下：(i) 联邦税收和转移支付体系是累进的。(ii) 州和地方税收及转移支付体系平均而言接近比例税制。(iii) 各州在税收水平和税收累进性上存在显著异质性。(iv) 主要依赖销售税和财产税的州往往拥有累退的税收体系和较低的平均税率。主要依赖所得税的州往往拥有累进的税收体系和较高的平均税率。(v) 累退的州集中在南部，并吸引了更多的州际净移民，尤其是高收入移民。(vi) 在2005年至2016年间，州累进性总体保持稳定。(vii) 纳入公司所得税和营业税会降低平均州累进性，但提高联邦累进性。(viii) 将公共物品和服务的支出作为转移支付纳入，对衡量的累进性有较大的正向影响。

33384.title: Rationalizing Firm Forecasts
33384.authors: Nicholas Bloom, Mihai A. Codreanu, Robert A. Fletcher
33384.abstract: We conduct a five-year, ten-wave panel survey in collaboration with a large U.S. payments company, collecting incentivized sales forecasts from over 6,000 firms. The sample is representative of the size distribution of U.S. employer firms. We find that firms exhibit remarkably poor forecasting accuracy, with bias, predictable errors, and over-precision, particularly in smaller firms. To explore the sources of forecast inaccuracy we implement four randomized controlled trials: improving data use, increasing incentives, providing training, and encouraging contingent thinking. While enhanced data use and incentives lead to modest improvements in contemporaneous forecast accuracy, training and contingent thinking yield no measurable effects. None of the interventions improve forecasting accuracy in subsequent waves. Surveying economists, we find they predicted about half the inaccuracy and bias we found, highlighting the surprisingly large deviation of firms from rational expectations.
33384.zh_abstract: 我们与一家美国大型支付公司合作，进行了一项为期五年、共十轮的专家小组调查，收集了超过6,000家企业的激励性销售预测。样本代表了美国雇主企业的规模分布。我们发现企业表现出非常差的预测准确性，存在偏差、可预测的错误和过度精确，尤其是在小企业中。为了探究预测不准确的根源，我们实施了四项随机对照试验：改进数据使用、增加激励、提供培训以及鼓励情景思维。虽然增强数据使用和激励措施使同期预测准确性略有改善，但培训和情景思维没有产生可衡量的效果。没有一项干预措施能提高后续轮次的预测准确性。对经济学家的调查发现，他们预测到的我们发现的预测不准确性和偏差大约只有一半，这突显了企业行为与理性预期之间令人惊讶的巨大偏离。
33384.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, IO, ITI, LS, ME, PR；JEL：J0

33383.title: Home Sweet Home: How Much Do Employees Value Remote Work?
33383.zh_title: 家，甜蜜的家：员工对远程工作有多看重？
33383.authors: Zoe B. Cullen, Bobak Pakzad-Hurson, Ricardo Perez-Truglia
33383.abstract: We estimate the value employees place on remote work using revealed preferences in a high-stakes, real-world context, focusing on U.S. tech workers. On average, employees are willing to accept a 25% pay cut for partly or fully remote roles. Our estimates are three to five times that of previous studies. We attribute this discrepancy partly to methodological differences, suggesting that existing methods may understate preferences for remote work. Because of the strong preference for remote work, we expected to find a compensating wage differential, with remote positions offering lower compensation than otherwise identical in-person positions. However, using novel data on salaries for tech jobs, we reject that hypothesis. We propose potential explanations for this puzzle, including optimization frictions and worker sorting.
33383.zh_abstract: 我们利用高风险、现实世界背景下的显示性偏好来估计员工对远程工作的价值，重点关注美国科技工作者。平均而言，员工愿意接受25%的减薪来换取部分或完全远程的职位。我们的估计值是先前研究的三到五倍。我们将这种差异部分归因于方法论上的差异，表明现有方法可能低估了对远程工作的偏好。由于对远程工作的强烈偏好，我们预期会发现补偿性工资差异，即远程职位提供的薪酬低于其他方面相同的现场职位。然而，利用关于科技职位薪资的新数据，我们否定了这一假设。我们为这个难题提出了可能的解释，包括优化摩擦和工人分类。

33382.title: The Impact of World War II Army Service on Income and Mobility in the 1960s by Ethnoracial Group
33382.zh_title: 二战陆军服役对不同种族群体在1960年代收入与流动性的影响
33382.authors: Sergio E. Barrera, Andreas Ferrara, Price V. Fishback, Misty L. Heggeness
33382.abstract: We analyze the impact of World War II service on income and mobility among male Army and Army Airforce veterans from various racial and ethnic groups, using linked 1940 Census, WWII enlistment, and 1969 administrative tax return data. The dataset includes non-Hispanic White, Black, Hispanic, Asian, and Native American men, providing insight into underexplored groups. Ordinary Least Squares estimates indicate that, compared to non-Army men within their groups, Army veterans earned higher incomes and were less likely to migrate across counties between 1940 and 1969, particularly among non-Hispanic Whites, Blacks, and Hispanics. To address potential selection bias, we applied a fuzzy regression discontinuity design, comparing men just eligible for service to those slightly too young. These estimates revealed that, in 1969, Army veterans generally had lower adjusted gross incomes than non-Army counterparts among non-Hispanic Whites, Blacks, and Asians, while Hispanic and Native American veterans earned slightly more. Income effects varied by type of income. Veterans also showed lower rates of county migration, particularly among non-Hispanic Whites, Asians, and Native Americans. Migration differences were minor for Blacks and Hispanics. These findings highlight nuanced outcomes of WWII service across diverse racial and ethnic groups.
33382.zh_abstract: 我们利用关联的1940年人口普查、二战征兵记录和1969年行政纳税申报数据，分析了二战服役对不同种族和民族群体的男性陆军及陆军航空队退伍军人收入和流动性的影响。数据集包括非西班牙裔白人、黑人、西班牙裔、亚裔和美洲原住民男性，为研究不足的群体提供了见解。普通最小二乘法估计表明，与其群体内的非陆军男性相比，陆军退伍军人收入更高，且在1940年至1969年间跨县迁移的可能性更低，尤其是在非西班牙裔白人、黑人和西班牙裔中。为了解决潜在的选择性偏差，我们应用了模糊断点回归设计，比较了刚好符合服役条件的男性和年龄稍小不符合条件的男性。这些估计显示，在1969年，非西班牙裔白人、黑人和亚裔的陆军退伍军人调整后总收入通常低于非陆军同龄人，而西班牙裔和美洲原住民退伍军人收入略高。收入效应因收入类型而异。退伍军人还表现出较低的县迁移率，尤其是在非西班牙裔白人、亚裔和美洲原住民中。黑人和西班牙裔的迁移差异较小。这些发现突显了二战服役对不同种族和民族群体产生的细微结果。

33381.title: Does Old Age Social Security Help Children? The Impact of Social Security on Grandchild Resources
33381.zh_title: 老年社会保障是否帮助了儿童？社会保障对孙辈资源的影响
33381.authors: Lucie Schmidt, Lara Shore-Sheppard, Tara Watson
33381.abstract: Though Social Security is typically considered a program to support retirees, nearly one in ten children live in a home with Social Security income. Children are substantially more likely to live with an older adult than they were two decades ago, and they are twice as likely to report Social Security income in their household as traditional cash welfare. We use the sharp increase in eligibility for Social Security benefits at age 62 to investigate the role played by the Social Security program in childhood economic resources among children who live with their grandparents. We do not find that Social Security eligibility increases household income on average, but it is associated with a shift towards Social Security income and reductions in deep poverty. We also see increased availability of household members’ time for home production.
33381.zh_abstract: 尽管社会保障通常被视为一项支持退休人员的计划，但近十分之一的儿童生活在有社会保障收入的家庭中。与二十年前相比，儿童与老年人同住的可能性显著增加，并且他们报告家庭中有社会保障收入的可能性是传统现金福利的两倍。我们利用62岁获得社会保障福利资格的急剧增加，来研究社会保障计划对与祖父母同住的儿童的经济资源所起的作用。我们没有发现社会保障资格平均会增加家庭收入，但它与向社会保障收入的转变以及深度贫困的减少有关。我们还观察到家庭成员用于家庭生产的时间可用性增加。

33380.title: Metacognitive Awareness and Academic Performance
33380.zh_title: 元认知意识与学业表现
33380.authors: Jarod T. Apperson, A. Nayena Blankson, Francesina Jackson, Angelino Viceisza, Bruce Wade, Jimmeka Guillory Wright
33380.abstract: Roughly 25 percent of first-year college students do not return for a second year. This has led to a range of policies and interventions aimed at increasing college performance, persistence, and graduation. In this article, we assess whether cognitive strategy instruction (CSI) has the potential to improve student performance in college. We conducted two randomized controlled trials in a mandatory, year-long, first-year, reading/writing-intensive course at Spelman College, a private historically Black institution for women. We find that CSI at best impacts grade-related outcomes like GPA, but not metacognitive knowledge or persistence. Future work will explore the impacts on longer-run outcomes such as graduation.
33380.zh_abstract: 大约25%的大学一年级学生不会返回第二年。这导致了旨在提高大学表现、坚持率和毕业率的一系列政策和干预措施。在本文中，我们评估了认知策略教学（CSI）是否有潜力提高大学生的学业表现。我们在斯佩尔曼学院（一所私立的传统黑人女子学院）一门为期一年的、必修的、以阅读/写作为重点的大一课程中进行了两项随机对照试验。我们发现，CSI最多能影响与成绩相关的结果，如平均绩点，但不能影响元认知知识或坚持率。未来的工作将探索对更长期结果（如毕业率）的影响。

33379.title: Empirically Distinguishing Health Impacts of Transboundary and Domestic Air Pollution in Mixture
33379.zh_title: 实证区分混合物中跨境与国内空气污染的健康影响
33379.authors: Jaecheol Lee, Andrew J. Wilson, Solomon M. Hsiang
33379.abstract: Particulate matter (PM) is a major, clinically important air pollutant. A large portion of emitted PM crosses borders, damaging health outside of its originating jurisdiction, but due in part to technical obstacles these pollutant flows remain unregulated. Proposed attribution approaches assume that units of PM originating in different jurisdictions cause the same harm, despite a widespread understanding that differing chemical and physical features of PM could generate distinct health effects. We use an atmospheric model to decompose the origins of PM individuals are exposed to at each location in South Korea, the nexus of one of the world's most contentious transboundary air pollution disputes, every day during 2005–2016. We then link these data to universal healthcare records in an econometric analysis that simultaneously measures and accounts for harms from seven types of PM, each from a distinct origin. We discover that the health harm of a unit of transboundary PM is approximately 5× (North Korea) and 2.6× (China) greater than a unit of PM originating within South Korea, and that health responses to PM from natural sources differs from those to anthropogenic sources. Because harms differ by origin, we compute that transboundary sources contribute only 43% of anthropogenic PM exposure in South Korea but generate over 70% of its associated respiratory health costs. Our results suggest that PM should be treated as a mixture of distinct pollutants, each with a unique measurable impact on human health.
33379.zh_abstract: 颗粒物是一种主要的、临床上重要的空气污染物。很大一部分排放的颗粒物跨越国界，对其来源管辖区以外的健康造成损害，但部分由于技术障碍，这些污染物流动仍未受到监管。提出的归因方法假设源自不同管辖区的颗粒物单位造成相同的危害，尽管人们普遍认为颗粒物不同的化学和物理特征可能产生不同的健康效应。我们使用大气模型分解了2005-2016年间韩国（世界上最具争议的跨境空气污染争端之一的中心）每个地点个体暴露的颗粒物来源。然后，我们将这些数据与全民医疗记录联系起来，进行了一项计量经济学分析，同时衡量并解释了来自七种不同来源的颗粒物造成的危害。我们发现，一个单位的跨境颗粒物（来自朝鲜）的健康危害大约是源自韩国境内的颗粒物单位的5倍，来自中国的约为2.6倍，并且对来自自然源的颗粒物的健康反应与对人为源的反应不同。由于危害因来源而异，我们计算出跨境来源仅占韩国人为颗粒物暴露的43%，但却产生了其相关呼吸道健康成本的70%以上。我们的结果表明，颗粒物应被视为不同污染物的混合物，每种污染物对人类健康都有独特的可衡量的影响。
33379.meta: Programs：EEE, EH, PE；JEL：C80, F18, H51, H79, H87, I1, I18, Q52, Q53, R11

33378.title: Drive Down the Cost: Learning by Doing and Government Policies in the Global EV Battery Industry
33378.zh_title: 降低成本：全球电动汽车电池行业的干中学与政府政策
33378.authors: Panle Jia Barwick, Hyuk-Soo Kwon, Shanjun Li, Nahim B. Zahur
33378.abstract: Electric vehicle (EV) battery costs have declined by more than 90% over the past decade. This study investigates the role of learning-by-doing (LBD) in driving this reduction and its interaction with two major government policies – consumer EV subsidies and local content requirements. Leveraging rich data on EV models and battery suppliers, we develop and estimate a structural model of the global EV industry that incorporates heterogeneous consumer choices and strategic pricing behaviors of EV producers and battery suppliers. The model allows us to recover battery costs for each EV model and quantify the extent of LBD in battery production. The learning rate is estimated to be 9.2% during our sample period after controlling for industry technological progress, economies of scale, input costs, and EV assembly experience. LBD magnifies the effectiveness of consumer EV subsidies and drives cross-country spillovers from these subsidies. Upstream battery suppliers capture only a minor share of LBD’s economic benefits, and consumer EV subsidies correct for the under-provision of learning and improve social welfare. China’s local content requirement helps domestic suppliers gain a competitive advantage at the cost of consumers and foreign suppliers, but would have harmed domestic welfare if delayed by five years.
33378.zh_abstract: 过去十年，电动汽车电池成本下降了90%以上。本研究调查了干中学在推动这一下降中的作用，及其与两项主要政府政策——消费者电动汽车补贴和本地化要求——的相互作用。利用丰富的电动汽车车型和电池供应商数据，我们开发并估计了一个全球电动汽车行业的结构模型，该模型包含了异质性消费者选择以及电动汽车生产商和电池供应商的战略定价行为。该模型使我们能够恢复每种电动汽车车型的电池成本，并量化电池生产中干中学的程度。在控制了行业技术进步、规模经济、投入成本和电动汽车组装经验后，我们样本期间的学习率估计为9.2%。干中学放大了消费者电动汽车补贴的有效性，并推动了这些补贴的跨国溢出效应。上游电池供应商仅获得了干中学经济收益的一小部分，而消费者电动汽车补贴纠正了学习供给不足的问题并改善了社会福利。中国的本地化要求帮助国内供应商获得了竞争优势，但代价是消费者和外国供应商的利益，但如果推迟五年实施，则会损害国内福利。
33378.meta: Programs：EEE, IO, ITI；JEL：F13, L0, L52, L62, Q48

33377.title: Spatial Environmental Economics
33377.authors: Clare A. Balboni, Joseph S. Shapiro
33377.abstract: How do environmental goods and policies shape spatial patterns of economic activity? How will climate change modify these impacts over the coming decades? How do agglomeration, commuting, and other spatial forces and policies affect environmental quality? We distill theoretical and empirical research linking urban, regional, and spatial economics to the environment. We present stylized facts on spatial environmental economics, describe insights from canonical environmental models and spatial models, and discuss the building blocks for papers and the research frontier in enviro-spatial economics. Most enviro-spatial research remains bifurcated into either primarily environmental or spatial papers. Research is only beginning to realize potential insights from more closely combining spatial and environmental approaches.
33377.zh_abstract: 环境物品与政策如何塑造经济活动的空间模式？气候变化将在未来几十年如何改变这些影响？集聚、通勤及其他空间力量与政策如何影响环境质量？我们梳理了将城市、区域和空间经济学与环境联系起来的理论与实证研究。我们呈现了空间环境经济学的典型事实，描述了经典环境模型和空间模型的见解，并讨论了环境-空间经济学论文的构建模块和研究前沿。大多数环境-空间研究仍然主要分为环境类或空间类论文。研究才刚刚开始认识到更紧密结合空间与环境方法可能带来的潜在见解。
33377.meta: Programs：EEE, EH, IO, ITI, LS, PE, POL, PR；JEL：F18, F64, H23, J61, O18, Q50, R11
